meta.description: A virtual GitHub pull request — title, description, patch and metadata ready to push as a real PR later
meta.keywords: github pr pull request patch diff branch review merge

skills.claude: A GitHub PR item is a virtual PR — it holds everything needed to open a real PR on GitHub but does not push anything. Use the 'patch' field for the raw git diff. When a real PR is ready to be opened, a separate function will read this item and call the GitHub API.

headCommitSha.description: SHA of the HEAD commit the patch applies to

repositoryUrl.description: HTTPS URL of the target GitHub repository

pushStatus.description: Whether this virtual PR has been materialised as a real GitHub PR

linkedTickets.description: Kanecta UUIDs of linked Jira Story items

generatedByRun.description: UUID of the pipeline run that produced this virtual PR

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_30343d19_3272_4dc9_9d89_f37f713b1819" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "title" TEXT,
    "body" TEXT,
    "patch" TEXT,
    "base_branch" TEXT,
    "head_branch" TEXT,
    "head_commit_sha" TEXT,
    "repository_url" TEXT,
    "status" TEXT,
    "draft" BOOLEAN,
    "push_status" TEXT,
    "labels" TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    "assignees" TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    "reviewers" TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    "linked_tickets" UUID[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    "generated_by_run" UUID,
    "checks_status" TEXT,
    "additions" INTEGER,
    "deletions" INTEGER,
    "changed_files" INTEGER,
    "merge_commit_sha" TEXT,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_30343d19_3272_4dc9_9d89_f37f713b1819" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_30343d1932724dc9_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_30343d1932724dc9_generated_by_run" FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by_run") REFERENCES items(id)
)
